title: What is ambient AI?
summary: Chatbots keep getting smarter, but they're creating a new kind of busywork. Even if they simplify an entire workflow, you still have to open an app, start a new chat, and get to the objective prompt-by-prompt. If you're the one doing the repetitive work, who's actually the copilot in this equation? Ambient AI puts you back into the pilot seat.
